title: Retell a short podcast
subtitle: Say topic, speaker view, and your reaction.
overview: Say topic, speaker view, and your reaction.
B1 Bridge builds connected speaking: clear points, useful reasons, real examples, repair phrases, short writing, and natural spoken practice.

sections.title: B1 bridge focus
rows: Today you practice short audio retelling. Keep the answer clear, connected, and useful in real conversation.
复述音频能同时训练听力、记忆和口语组织。
A practical B1 frame: start with the main idea, add one reason, give one real detail, and finish naturally.
实用 B1 框架：先说主要想法，加一个原因，给一个真实细节，然后自然收尾。
Retell a short audio clip in three sentences.
用三句话复述一段短音频。
The speaker talked about morning routines. Their main point was that a simple routine reduces stress. I found it useful because I often waste time after waking up.
说话者谈到了早晨习惯。他们的主要观点是简单的习惯能减少压力。我觉得它有用，因为我醒来后经常浪费时间。

items.en: Today you practice short audio retelling. Keep the answer clear, connected, and useful in real conversation.
items.zh: 复述音频能同时训练听力、记忆和口语组织。

items.en: A practical B1 frame: start with the main idea, add one reason, give one real detail, and finish naturally.
items.zh: 实用 B1 框架：先说主要想法，加一个原因，给一个真实细节，然后自然收尾。

items.en: The speaker talked about morning routines. Their main point was that a simple routine reduces stress. I found it useful because I often waste time after waking up.
items.zh: 说话者谈到了早晨习惯。他们的主要观点是简单的习惯能减少压力。我觉得它有用，因为我醒来后经常浪费时间。

items.en: This is B1 practice: clear enough, connected enough, and useful in real life.
items.zh: 这是 B1 练习：足够清楚、足够连贯，并且能在真实生活中使用。

items.en: I do not need perfect English today; I need organized English that I can say aloud.
items.zh: 今天我不需要完美英语；我需要能大声说出来的、有条理的英语。

items.en: First, say the sentence slowly and clearly.
items.zh: 首先，慢速清楚地说这个句子。

items.en: Then, say it again with a natural rhythm.
items.zh: 然后，用自然节奏再说一遍。

items.en: Finally, change one detail and make it true for your life.
items.zh: 最后，改变一个细节，让它符合你的真实生活。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Retell a short audio clip in three sentences.
lines.zh: 用三句话复述一段短音频。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: The speaker talked about morning routines. Their main point was that a simple routine reduces stress. I found it useful because I often waste time after waking up.
lines.zh: 说话者谈到了早晨习惯。他们的主要观点是简单的习惯能减少压力。我觉得它有用，因为我醒来后经常浪费时间。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you make it shorter and clearer?
lines.zh: 你能把它说得更短、更清楚吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will keep the main idea, one reason, and one real detail.
lines.zh: 可以。我会保留主要想法、一个原因和一个真实细节。

items.en: Retell a short audio clip in three sentences.
items.zh: 用三句话复述一段短音频。

items.en: Answer with the frame first, then answer again with your own real details.
items.zh: 先用框架回答，然后用你自己的真实细节再回答一遍。

items.en: Record one version. Listen for clear rhythm, not perfect grammar.
items.zh: 录一个版本。听清楚节奏，而不是追求完美语法。

items.en: Keep the answer between four and six sentences.
items.zh: 把回答控制在四到六句之间。
